title: Scanner (disambiguation)
content:
'''Scanner''' can refer to any of the following devices:

==Canon==
[[File:AhsokaAttendsToRotto-TCWf.png|thumb|right|250px|[[Rotta]] the huttlet under a medical scanner]]
*[[Chip scanner]]
*[[Comm/scan processor]]
*[[EnhanceScan general purpose scanner]]
*[[Life-form scanner]]
*[[Low-feedback scanner]]
*[[Portable scanner]]
*[[SE-90 Structural Engineering Scanner]]
*[[The Scanner]]

==Legends==
[[File:PortableScanner.jpg|thumb|right|[[Aurra Sing/Legends|Aurra Sing's]] portable scanner]]
*[[Card scanner]]
*[[Circuit scanner]]
*[[Com-scan]]
*[[Courier Communications Scanner]]
*[[Doppraymagno scanner]]
*[[Energy scanner]]
**[[9000 Energy Scanner]]
*[[EnhanceScan general-purpose scanner]]
*[[Field scanner]]
*[[Geoscanner/Legends|Geoscanner]]
**[[7000 Geoscanner]]
*[[Hyperspace Orbiting Scanner]]
*[[Industrial mineral scanner]]
*[[Lifeform scanner]]
**[[ILF-5000 Life Form Scanner]]
*[[Low-feedback scanner/Legends|Low-feedback scanner]]
*[[Measuring scanner]]
**[[A-11 cargo scanner]]
*[[Orbital long range scanner]]
*[[Portable scanner/Legends|Portable scanner]]
*[[Scanner Jammer]]
*[[Scanner pack]]
*[[Security scanner/Legends|Security scanner]]
*[[Tech scanner]]
*[[Vision-plus scanner]]
